name: soydiloreto/hola-simpsons
description: Hola Simpsons WordPress plugin — Composer manifest for development tooling. Not used at runtime.
_platform-comment: The plugin's runtime requirement is PHP 7.0 (see Requires PHP in hola-simpsons.php and readme.txt). Psalm 5.x and PHPUnit 9.6 however need PHP >= 7.4 to install. We pin config.platform.php to 7.4.30 so Composer resolves the dev stack correctly; this does NOT change the plugin's runtime support, which the PHPCS PHPCompatibility ruleset still validates against the 7.0 baseline.

scripts-descriptions.test:unit: Run only the unit-test suite (no WordPress runtime required, fast).
scripts-descriptions.lint: Run PHP_CodeSniffer with WordPress Coding Standards. Reports violations.
scripts-descriptions.lint:fix: Run PHP Code Beautifier and Fixer to auto-fix violations PHPCBF can handle.
scripts-descriptions.stan: Run PHPStan static analysis at the configured level (see phpstan.neon).
scripts-descriptions.psalm:taint: Run Psalm in taint-analysis mode to flag user-controlled values flowing into dangerous sinks (XSS, SQLi, RCE).
